title: NeoForgeimized
description: Optimizing your NeoForge for better performance and an improved experience in combat
body:
What's NeoForgeimized? NeoForgeimized is an optimization modpack meant to help you with your performance issues and boost overall performance. This means unlike some modpacks it wont decrease your performance with mods that are not needed.

Can I PvP with NeoForgeimized? Yes you can with the PvP mods added to help u in combat. Ofc it wont make u the best PvPer.

How can I install this modpack? You can install it right here on the modrinth website by clicking on versions and downloading the version you desire or you can download it off the modrinth app and it will automatically install the modpack for you.

This Modpack isn't only meant for low end pc's it can also help with performance on mid end or high end pc's. Because we all know Minecraft Java edition isn't exactly... Optimized.

You can get an idea of how much fps I got with this modpack with no settings changed at gallery
